title: Šilutė, Šilutė District — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Šilutė, Šilutė District: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Šilutė is a city in Šilutė District with a population of 17,000. A town in the Klaipėda region, known for its German-influenced architecture, the Šilutė Museum, and proximity to the Nemunas Delta and Curonian Spit.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
